node.text:
# The April 2026 Easter Content Update
@everyone, the team is taking down all servers to apply this month's update. Please use the following direct connect information to find your way to your favorite Rustafied servers!
-# **__Note__**: Keep in mind that the **Friday **server votes are still open, we'll have a random map for the day and the voted maps are going to be played as of tomorrow's wipes.
🇦🇺 **__Australian Servers__** 🇦🇺 ``` aulong.rustafied.com aumain.rustafied.com aumedium.rust

На Monthly сервере произошел вайп без удаления чертежей! На Biweekly сервере чертежи были удалены.
Rust Room [Monthly]: connect monthly.rustroom.gg Rust Room [Biweekly]: connect biweekly.rustroom.gg...
После завершения зарядки питание было отключено
